tasks.label: Test Dotfiles in Docker (Debian)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -it -v "${workspaceFolder}:/dotfiles:ro" -e CHEZMOI_EMAIL=test@example.com -e TERM=xterm-256color docker.io/library/debian:bookworm bash -c 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl git zsh lsb-release && mkdir -p /root/.local/bin && curl -fsSL https://github.com/JanDeDobbeleer/oh-my-posh/releases/latest/download/posh-linux-amd64 -o /root/.local/bin/oh-my-posh && chmod +x /root/.local/bin/oh-my-posh && sh -c "$(curl -fsLS get.chezmoi.io)" -- init --apply --source=/dotfiles; exec zsh'

tasks.label: Test Dotfiles in Docker (Ubuntu)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -it -v "${workspaceFolder}:/dotfiles:ro" -e CHEZMOI_EMAIL=test@example.com -e TERM=xterm-256color docker.io/library/ubuntu:24.04 bash -c 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y curl git zsh lsb-release && mkdir -p /root/.local/bin && curl -fsSL https://github.com/JanDeDobbeleer/oh-my-posh/releases/latest/download/posh-linux-amd64 -o /root/.local/bin/oh-my-posh && chmod +x /root/.local/bin/oh-my-posh && sh -c "$(curl -fsLS get.chezmoi.io)" -- init --apply --source=/dotfiles; exec zsh'

tasks.label: Test Ansible Playbook - Syntax Check (Docker)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}:/dotfiles:ro" docker.io/library/debian:bookworm bash -c 'apt-get update -qq && apt-get install -y -qq ansible > /dev/null && cd /dotfiles/scripts/ansible && ansible-galaxy install -r requirements.yml && ansible-playbook playbook.yml -i inventory/hosts.yml --syntax-check'

tasks.label: Test Ansible Playbook - Full Apply (Docker)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -it -v "${workspaceFolder}:/dotfiles:ro" docker.io/library/debian:bookworm bash -c 'apt-get update && apt-get install -y ansible python3-apt sudo && cd /dotfiles/scripts/ansible && ansible-galaxy install -r requirements.yml && ansible-playbook playbook.yml -i inventory/hosts.yml -c local; exec bash'

tasks.label: Shell Lint (shellcheck)
tasks.command: docker run --rm -v "${workspaceFolder}:/dotfiles:ro" docker.io/library/debian:bookworm bash -lc 'apt-get update -qq >/dev/null && apt-get install -y -qq shellcheck >/dev/null && shellcheck /dotfiles/dot_bashrc /dotfiles/dot_profile /dotfiles/dot_config/shell_common /dotfiles/.vscode/test-dotfiles.sh /dotfiles/.vscode/test-ansible-idempotence.sh /dotfiles/scripts/debian/*.sh /dotfiles/scripts/ansible/*.sh'
